As you traverse the array, what is the best price to buy at? It's the lowest price you've seen so far.
Track the minimum price seen so far as you iterate through the array left to right.
At each day, the maximum possible profit if you sell today is `current_price - minimum_price_seen_so_far`.
Keep updating a `max_profit` variable with the highest profit found, and update the `min_price` variable if you find a new lower price.
